repair_cycle_notes: Cycle 1 (Option H, 7 atoms in 35b): unescaped double-quote inside TABLE_ROW verbatim string (e.g. 'Examples: "MRI", "CT SCAN".' broke JSON parse). Regex-driven re-escape on 7 lines (p.346 a002/a003/a004/a005/a006/a007 + p.347 a012). Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_35b.jsonl.pre-OptionH-unescaped-quotes.bak. Post-fix: 0 JSON parse errors.

Cycle 2 (Option H, 6 atoms in 35b): (a) 5 LIST_ITEM atoms in TU – Assumptions block (p.346 a016/a017/a018 + p.347 a001/a002) had non-null sibling_index (1-5) field set — schema violation (only HEADING gets sibling_index/heading_level). Stripped sibling_index + heading_level on these atoms. (b) 1 HEADING atom (p.350 a016 'tr.xpt, Tumor/Lesion Results — Findings...') was misclassified as HEADING hl=6 sib=1 — actually a Spec table caption (parallel to TU/SS/SC pattern where this caption is SENTENCE). Demoted atom_type HEADING→SENTENCE + nullified heading_level/sibling_index. Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_35b.jsonl.pre-OptionH-cycle2-listitem-and-tr-caption.bak.

Cycle 3 (Option H, 10 atoms in 35b): writer-family TABLE_HEADER fabrication + value cell drop + char corruption motif NEW round-8 (post v1.4 N3 EMERGENCY-CRITICAL codification 2026-04-28). 4 structural fixes + 6 char-substitution fixes: (a) p.347 a011 TABLE_HEADER had fabricated trailing 'SCREEN' column ('| TULNKID | TUTESTCD | TUTEST | TUORRES | VISIT | SCREEN |' — 7 pipes, 6 cols) — corrected to PDF-true 5 cols / 6 pipes ('| TULNKID | TUTESTCD | TUTEST | TUORRES | VISIT |'); (b) p.347 a026 TABLE_HEADER had col-name + data MASHED ('TULOCL TUORLOC LOCATION OF INTEREST' / 'TULOC SPLEEN' / 'TUMETHOD CT SCAN' instead of PDF's 'TUORRES | TULOC | TUMETHOD') — corrected to PDF-true 6 cols; (c) p.347 a027 L01 data row had 3 trailing empty cells (data was MASHED INTO TABLE_HEADER instead of in row) — restored to PDF-true 'LOCATION OF INTEREST | SPLEEN | CT SCAN'; (d) p.349 a010 TABLE_HEADER fabricated trailing 'VISIT' column not in PDF (10 pipes / 9 cols → 9 pipes / 8 cols); (e) p.349 a011-a016 (6 TABLE_ROWs) TUTESTCD char corruption 'DRCRCLTC' → PDF-true 'DRCRLTLC' (multi-axis char substitution at positions 5-7). Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_35b.jsonl.pre-OptionH-cycle3-table-header-fabrication-and-DRCRLTLC.bak. Post-fix: 0 N5 pipe-count violations / 0 schema violations / 0 JSON parse errors. RESIDUAL UNFIXED (pushed to findings): NT02 row missing from p.347 Table 1 (writer dropped 1 row of 9 — would require atom insertion not surgical Option H); content drop documented as O-P1-118 MEDIUM.

findings_added.category: writer-family TABLE_HEADER fabrication motif NEW round-8 (post v1.4 N3 EMERGENCY-CRITICAL codification 2026-04-28 ineffective at preventing first-round-running recurrence)
findings_added.title: v1.4 N3 prompt-codification ineffective at preventing writer-family TABLE_HEADER fabrication on FIRST round running v1.4 baseline post-cut — 3 separate TABLE_HEADERs in 35b had fabricated/MASHED trailing columns
findings_added.scope: 3 TABLE_HEADER atoms in 35b (1st round running v1.4 baseline post-cut 2026-04-28): (a) p.347 a011 fabricated trailing 'SCREEN' col ('| TULNKID | TUTESTCD | TUTEST | TUORRES | VISIT | SCREEN |' should be 5 cols ending with VISIT — SCREEN was data value of first row's VISIT column, not column name); (b) p.347 a026 col-names + L01 row data MASHED ('TULOCL TUORLOC LOCATION OF INTEREST' should be 'TUORRES' / 'TULOC SPLEEN' should be 'TULOC' / 'TUMETHOD CT SCAN' should be 'TUMETHOD' — 6 cols header CORRECT but 3 col-names CORRUPTED with first data row's values); (c) p.349 a010 fabricated trailing 'VISIT' col not in PDF (should be 8 cols ending with TUMETHOD).
findings_added.rule_violation: v1.4 R10 strict verbatim no-paraphrase + v1.4 N3 EMERGENCY-CRITICAL whole-row TABLE_ROW value-cell verbatim integrity (extends to TABLE_HEADER cell-name verbatim integrity per N3 implication); writer fabricated/MASHED trailing column-names from data values in ALL 3 cases. Joins 3 cumulative round 5+6+7 writer-direction main-line VALUE HALLUCINATION recurrences (round 5 O-P1-85 + round 6 O-P1-103 + round 7 O-P1-109) as 4th cumulative writer-direction recurrence — but NEW DIMENSION: this is on FIRST round running v1.4 baseline post-cut, demonstrating prompt-text codification ALONE may not be sufficient.
findings_added.repair_action: Option H Cycle 3 surgical fix (4 atoms structural): TABLE_HEADER text correction per PDF transcription on a011/a026/a010 + L01 data row a027 restored. Backup: pdf_atoms_batch_35b.jsonl.pre-OptionH-cycle3-table-header-fabrication-and-DRCRLTLC.bak. Post-fix: 0 N5 violations + 100% Rule A reviewer verdict.
findings_added.v1_5_codification_candidate: v1.5 NEW8.e (escalation of v1.4 N3): writer-side mandatory pre-DONE TABLE_HEADER cell-count regex AUTO-VALIDATION against PDF physical ground truth (not just prompt text instruction). Implementation: writer/executor MUST after writing TABLE_HEADER atom, re-Read corresponding PDF page region + count actual table column cells via OCR/text-extraction + assert cell-count match + halt-on-mismatch with Option H auto-fix proposal. Joins v1.4 N3 codification stack as escalation candidate. Priority: HIGH (4th cumulative writer-direction main-line recurrence + prompt-only codification proven insufficient on 1st-round-running test).
findings_added.writer_family_motif: TABLE_HEADER value/structure fabrication motif. Distinct from prior writer-family motifs in form (header-side, not row-side) but EQUIVALENT in mechanism (value hallucination from training-data templates OR misreading PDF table boundaries treating data row 1 as part of header). Severity HIGH because (a) 3 separate TABLE_HEADERs affected = systematic; (b) downstream consumers/RAG see corrupted column structure for entire associated tables; (c) v1.4 N3 prompt-codification proven INSUFFICIENT on first run; (d) caught only by main-session structural sweep (1:14+ amplification ratio analogous to round 7 batch 34 1:14).
